prose.en: Require the developer of the system, system component, or system service to execute procedures for ensuring that security-relevant hardware, software, and firmware updates distributed to the organization are exactly as specified by the master copies.

guidance.en: The trusted distribution of security-relevant hardware, software, and firmware updates help to ensure that the updates are correct representations of the master copies maintained by the developer and have not been tampered with during distribution.

prose.en: the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to execute procedures for ensuring that security-relevant hardware, software, and firmware updates distributed to the organization are exactly as specified by the master copies.

objects.en: procedures addressing system developer configuration management
acquisition contracts for the system, system component, or system service
Organizational personnel with system and service acquisition responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with configuration management responsibilities
Organizational processes for monitoring developer configuration management
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the monitoring of developer configuration management
